skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Reviews code for quality, security, and maintainability following team standards. Use when reviewing pull requests, examining code changes, or when the user asks for a code review.
skills.author: skill-library
skills.installCommand: npx skills add tianqi815/skill-library --skill code-review -a cursor -y

skills.name: commit-message
skills.description: Generates descriptive commit messages by analyzing git diffs following conventional commits. Use when the user asks for help writing commit messages or reviewing staged changes before commit.
skills.author: skill-library
skills.installCommand: npx skills add tianqi815/skill-library --skill commit-message -a cursor -y

skills.name: excel-to-markdown
skills.description: Parses Excel (.xlsx, .xls) and CSV spreadsheets into Markdown tables. Use when converting Excel to Markdown, parsing spreadsheet tables, or exporting tabular data to documentation.
skills.author: skill-library
skills.installCommand: npx skills add tianqi815/skill-library --skill excel-to-markdown -a cursor -y

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.description: Creates distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use when building web components, pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling and beautifying any web UI.
skills.author: skill-library
skills.installCommand: npx skills add tianqi815/skill-library --skill frontend-design -a cursor -y

skills.name: oidc-integration
skills.description: Integrates self-hosted OIDC Server for React frontend and Node.js Express backend using openid-client v5. Use when implementing SSO, login flows, OIDC callbacks, or replacing legacy auth with OIDC. Supports coexist mode (legacy + OIDC) and replace mode (OIDC only).
skills.author: skill-library
skills.installCommand: npx skills add tianqi815/skill-library --skill oidc-integration -a cursor -y

skills.name: oidc-integration
skills.description: 前後端項目接入自建 OIDC Server 的技能。為 React 前端和 Node.js（Express）後端提供完整的 OIDC 身份驗證整合方案，使用 openid-client v5.x 函式庫。僅適用於自建 OIDC Server。支援兩種整合模式：共存模式（保留舊登入 + 新增 OIDC）與替換模式（移除舊登入、僅用 OIDC）。用於實施統一登入、權杖管理、API 認證中介軟體。當需要為項目接入自建 OIDC 服務、實現單一登入（SSO）、替換或並行現有登入邏輯時使用此技能。
skills.author: skill-library
skills.installCommand: npx skills add tianqi815/skill-library --skill oidc-integration -a cursor -y
